The '''giant forest beast''' was a creature found on the Forest [[Moon/Legends|Moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It was capable of producing a flagrant projection.

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
